rationale: PR is explicitly marked [WIP] in the title 'Update vulnerable dependencies identified in security alerts' and the body's task list shows only the first two checkboxes ticked: 'Inspect existing repository automation' and 'Add minimal GitHub workflow/script to triage Dependabot and code scanning alerts per policy'. The diff matches that scope by adding a single new file .github/workflows/daily-security-report.yml (274 lines) implementing a scheduled actions/github-script@v7 job that paginates github.rest.codeScanning.listAlertsForRepo and the dependabot/alerts REST endpoint, normalizes severity, applies a production-path reachability filter (isProductionPath: lexio/ or python/lexio/, excluding examples/, tests, stories), categorizes blast radius, and orchestrates peter-evans/create-pull-request@v7 plus an issue-creation flow. No production dependency changes (which is honest given the unchecked 'targeted validation' checkbox), no fake remediation. Closed without merge appears to be editorial since the workflow does the triage work described in the only completed task; the actual remediation belongs to subsequent PRs.
